training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

model.description: Preserve parent official target-gene-aware head; blueprint delta is discriminative/layerwise LR schedule metadata, not architecture replacement.

training.note: Current train_pending optimizer may consume a single lr, so the node records formal LR groups while preserving the parent model path for strict audit.

pipeline_program.head: parent target-gene-aware low-rank/bilinear residual head preserved
pipeline_program.training_strategy: recorded layerwise/discriminative LR groups for trunk, dense head, target residual head, and bias/scale parameters
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: Layerwise LR schedule training-strategy child over a source-backed official K562 target-aware model; data split and Macro-F1 reward unchanged.
